label: Thematic Retrieval
description: Techniques and models focused on retrieving information in a coherent thematic sequence.
doc_sources: Modeling Local Coherence — Barzilay & Lapata (2008)
Pachinko Allocation: DAG-Structured Mixture Models — Li & McCallum (2006)
RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation — Lewis et al. (2020)

label: Neural Language Models
description: This cluster discusses various advanced neural network architectures designed for natural language processing tasks, including Transformer, BERT, and GPT-3.
doc_sources: The Transformer Revolution: Architecture, Training, and Scale

label: Text Coherence
description: The study of methods and models to ensure that text, particularly in machine-generated responses like RAG answers, maintains logical flow and thematic consistency.
doc_sources: Coherence in Text Generation: Theory, Models, and Applications
Modeling Local Coherence — Barzilay & Lapata (2008)
RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation — Lewis et al. (2020)
CTRLsum: Controlled Summarization with Keywords — He et al. (2022)
Theme-Guided Retrieval for Long-Form QA — Shen et al. (2024)
REALM: Retrieval-Enhanced Language Model Pre-Training — Guu et al. (2020)

label: Topic Modeling Metrics and Evaluation
description: This cluster discusses various metrics and evaluation methods used in topic modeling to assess model performance and select optimal parameters.
doc_sources: Coherence in Text Generation: Theory, Models, and Applications
Topic Modeling Evaluation: Metrics, Methods, and Best Practices

label: Information Retrieval Techniques
description: This cluster discusses various methods for information retrieval, focusing on sparse and dense retrieval models.
doc_sources: Modern Retrieval Systems: From Sparse to Dense to Hybrid

label: Neural Network Scaling
description: This theme covers the optimization and efficiency of neural network training, including attention mechanisms and scaling laws.
doc_sources: The Transformer Revolution: Architecture, Training, and Scale

label: Theme Transition and Pipeline
description: This cluster discusses methods for managing transitions between themes in multi-theme answers and outlines a pipeline for handling multi-theme queries using neural topic models.
doc_sources: Coherence in Text Generation: Theory, Models, and Applications
Theme-Guided Retrieval for Long-Form QA — Shen et al. (2024)

label: Topic Modeling Techniques
description: This cluster discusses various methods and algorithms used for identifying themes or topics in large collections of documents.
doc_sources: Latent Dirichlet Allocation — Blei et al. (2003)
TopicGPT: Topic Modeling with Large Language Models — Pham et al. (2023)
Topic-Aware Evidence Reasoning for Claim Verification — Zhao et al. (2021)
BERTopic: Neural Topic Modelling — Grootendorst (2022)
Pachinko Allocation: DAG-Structured Mixture Models — Li & McCallum (2006)
